data.description: When you are by an ally who is hit by an attack, and the creature making the attack can see you, you can use your reaction to make a melee attack against the creature.

When focused with ki, you can align and harness the forces of creation to bend your body into an extension of those elements. Some traditions dedicate themselves to harnessing the four elements: earth, fire, water, and air, using them as extensions of their will. At 3rd level, you can use an action to imbue a single unarmed strike with ki. Many of their tradition allow bodies that last these imperceptible vibrations, commonly imagined as dragons, phoenixes, plants, coiling mountains, crescent waves.

Once reach level this you spend you session in class. can additional points increase the level of elemental an ki lo discipline spell you provided that has the cas! hal casting class feature.
